name: Lemony Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 can Crushed pineapple (undrained, in unsweetened juice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the chicken broth to a boil in a small saucepan.
2. Completely dissolve the gelatin in the boiling broth.
3. Add water, pineapple, lemon juice, tarragon, and white pepper. Stir well.
4. Refrigerate until slightly thickened.
5. Stir in the chicken, celery, and red pepper.
6. Spoon the mixture into 4 individual plastic containers or serving dishes.
7. Refrigerate until firm, about 2 hours.
DIABETIC EXCHANGE (per serving): 2 lean meat, 1 vegetable; also 160 calories, 45mg cholesterol, 450mg sodium, 3gm fat, 11g carbohydrate, 22g protein.
